indicators.name: several long tables
indicators.rationale: Tables are too long and narrow for comfortable solo use, requiring multiple chairs to be pushed together, which can be cumbersome.

indicators.name: several chairs
indicators.rationale: Chairs are available for use, though their arrangement does not facilitate solo work.

indicators.name: several windows
indicators.rationale: Windows allow natural light, which can be beneficial for some tasks.

indicators.name: several ceiling lights
indicators.rationale: Ceiling lights provide general illumination, which is useful for tasks requiring more than just ambient light.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). While there are chairs and windows that could potentially support solo work, the long tables and lack of dedicated work surfaces make it difficult to set up a comfortable and efficient workspace. The presence of ceiling lights and natural light is positive, but the overall layout and furniture arrangement do not strongly support solo computer work.
